title: La gallina clueca
writer: Nicolás de las Llanderas, Arnaldo Malfatti, Carlos Orellana
actors: Sara García, Domingo Soler, Emma Roldán
plot: The story begins in 1930 Mexico. A mother widowed of 4 little ones. Her name is Teresa. While she sits by the roadside with her (little chicks) she meets a hardworking farm merchant on his way to market in Mexico city. He is hesit...
